vocab.meaning: thong thả dành thời gian (một cách dễ chịu)
vocab.example: I used to wile away my weekend afternoons sketching the stray cats that wandered into our garden.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu, ngắm nghía kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: As a young philatelist, I would pore over my stamp album for hours, examining every tiny detail with a magnifying glass.

vocab.meaning: hăng hái bắt đầu một việc gì đó với tất cả nhiệt huyết
vocab.example: Whenever I got a new Lego set, I would toss myself into the building process and refuse to eat until it was finished.

vocab.meaning: tham gia tuyển chọn, thử sức vào (đội nhóm, câu lạc bộ)
vocab.example: Driven by my love for performance, I decided to try out for the school play when I was in the third grade.
I used to spend my evenings at the planetarium, marveling at the vastness of the constellations projected above me.

vocab.meaning: lắp ráp, xây dựng nên thứ gì đó từ nhiều bộ phận
vocab.example: My favorite hobby was putting together intricate wooden puzzles that my grandfather used to bring back from his travels.

vocab.meaning: cập nhật, theo kịp (xu hướng, tin tức của một sở thích)
vocab.example: I worked hard to keep up with the latest trading card releases so I wouldn't be outmatched by my friends during recess.

vocab.meaning: dành riêng (thời gian/không gian) cho một mục đích
vocab.example: Every Sunday morning was set apart for my calligraphy practice, a ritual I took very seriously as a child.

vocab.meaning: tìm đến, dựa vào (thường là một sở thích quen thuộc khi buồn chán)
vocab.example: Whenever it rained and we couldn't play outside, I would fall back on my collection of board games to stay entertained.

vocab.meaning: dần dần biến mất, kết thúc trong tẻ nhạt (nói về một sở thích ngắn hạn)
vocab.example: I briefly took up knitting when I was seven, but my interest quickly fizzled out after I realized how much patience it required.
